name: sd_c3d_join_deleter
drl:
rule "RD"
no-loop
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    LK2(f1 == false)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "RJ"
when
    P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
_finding: THE H-QHEAD-vs-H-REENTRY SPLITTER: join-deleter decl-first at equal salience — oracle [RJ,RD,RD,RD] finals EMPTY (queue-head wins; zombie LK visible to the join through the run); engine [RJ] with all Ps surviving (early drain kills the join's tuples). Value-level split, doubly divergent.
